content.en:
Hunhe River Boundary Seam.

"Come in!"

Ye Tian appeared on a sea area and immediately hid his breath.

"The strength has not been suppressed, and the personality here is really higher!" Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't move immediately, but used his copying talent to probe the situation around him as soon as possible.

Soon, he spotted some of the creatures in the sea.

This area of the sea should be an ordinary sea area in the boundary of the Hunhe River, because the creatures here are not strong, there are quite a few of them, but most of them are weak.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled slowly, not daring to be too fast.

It didn't take long for him to sense a powerful Blood Transformation Realm creature.

"Eight Blood Transformation Realm Creature Creatures!"

This cultivation is at the stage of being reproducible.

So, he shot directly.

"Ancient Blood Spear!"

Ye Tian penetrated the opponent's body with one blow and killed the opponent in an instant.

After all, an ordinary eighth-stage Blood Transformation Realm creature was simply an ant-like existence in the eyes of an ancient-level genius like him.

After killing the other party, he copied the other party's body and used the other party's identity to find out the news in this sea area.

Soon, the body of this eight-time Blood Transformation Realm creature was successfully replicated.

"That's it, let's let this eight-time Blood Transformation Realm creature go to find out the information, and then decide on the following plan after understanding the information!" Ye Tian planned.

The purpose of his entry into the Hunhe Boundary Rift was to find treasures and opportunities, so he naturally had to plan carefully.

......

Ye Tian continued to search and explore, and soon came to an ancient giant city in this sea area.

"Falling into the sea city!"

There are no cultivators in this city, and there are also cultivators in the Hunhe Realm, but they are living miserably, and they are so suppressed by the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm that it is difficult to have a living space.

However, the Blood Transformation Realm creatures in the Hunhe River Rift have also formed a cultivation civilization system similar to that of cultivators, and they are not subject to racial constraints.

After entering Falling Sea City, Ye Tian met a lot of so-called 'friends', and these Blood Transformation Realm creatures should know the original owner of this body.

Fortunately, Ye Tian knew their names through the copying talent, so he fooled around casually and didn't talk too much.

In the following years, he searched for information in Falling Sea City.

Gradually, he got to know more and more about the place.

For example, this sea area is the Sea of Chao, which belongs to an area with scarce resources, and there are not many strong people here, but there are many creatures in the Blood Transformation Realm.

The overlord of the sea is the bone transformation realm creature - the ancient Chaos Dragon!

However, this primeval dragon had been asleep for a long time, so as long as it didn't break out in the battle of the Bone Transformation Realm in the Chaos Sea, it would hardly wake it up.

And the Falling Sea City was built by the Chaos Dragon Clan, a race of the primeval Chaos Dragon, in order to manage the Chaos Sea well.

Any creature trading here needs to pay a fee, so the dragon clan lives very comfortably by falling into the sea city.

Coupled with the support of the Ancient Chaos Dragon, the Bone Transformation Realm Ancestor, as long as they didn't provoke the existence of the Bone Transformation Realm, they would hardly be in trouble.

"Ancient Chaos Dragon!"

After Ye Tian knew about the existence of this bone transformation realm, he wondered if the other party would have an ancient-level ancestral endowment?

"Maybe you can try to get in touch with this primeval dragon!"

After some inquiry, Ye Tian also knew the place where the Ancient Chaos Dragon was sleeping - the Ancient Dragon Sea Mountain Range!

This place is located somewhere in the underground sea veins of the Chaos Sea, and no one dares to disturb it there, unless it is to seek death.

Ye Tian came here quickly, but he came here as an ordinary Blood Transformation Realm creature replicating his body.

Soon, he approached the Taikoo Longhai Mountain Range.

"Copy the talent!"

Ye Tian urged the copying talent to explore and find the location of the primeval dragon.

Soon, he sensed the Ancient Chaos Dragon.

Since his replica body was too weak, the primeval dragon would not awaken at all.

"Sure enough, there is an ancient-level ancestral endowment!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

【Ancient Ancestral Endowment: Dragon Scales】

This is obviously a defense-type primordial-level ancestral endowment, once it is copied and fused, it should be easy for him to cultivate the defense-type primordial technique.

After copying, Ye Tian left.

Subsequently, he annihilated the replica body.

......

"Fuse the primeval-grade ancestral dragon scales!"

Ye Tian quickly fused this primeval-level ancestral endowment.

At this time, he felt that his potential foundation had improved again, and even the bottleneck from the Eight Blood Transformation Realm to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm had been relaxed.

"If you find one or two more primeval-level ancestral endowments, and then copy and fuse them, it is estimated that you can easily break through the bottleneck and become a Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He couldn't stay in the Hunhe Realm for a long time, so he mixed in with a certain big force to slowly cultivate, which was unrealistic.

If the Hunhe River Boundary Rift and the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift were not connected together, it would be meaningless for him to raise the replica body here, no matter how powerful it was.

It is impossible for him to abandon his real body and copy his body, and completely mess up in the Hunhe Realm in the future!

"I have to take advantage of the time when I was excluded to get more resources!"

Ye Tian decided to go to another territory in the Hunhe River Boundary Gap - the Sea of Mixed Ruins!

The Sea of Chaos is the territory where the Chaos Cave is located, and there are a lot of resources there, and in addition to the top overlord-level force of the Chaos Cave, there are also many Blood Transformation Realm races attached to the Chaos Cave.

He was going to go to the Sea of Ruins to plunder the resources of those Blood Transformation Realm races, so that he could quickly accumulate wealth.

"Let's go to the Chaoxu Sea, there is no future in the Chaohai Sea, the resources here are too poor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly moved as this eight-time Blood Transformation Realm creature and headed for the Sea of Chaotic Ruins.

After some time, the Sea of Chaos has arrived!

The energy of the Chaos Sea is far beyond that of the Chaos Sea, and the Blood Transformation Realm creatures here are also more powerful, and it is easy to see the Eight Blood Transformation Realm and the Nine Blood Transformation Realm creatures,

Moreover, at every turn, you will encounter boundary-breaking geniuses and occasionally see primeval-level geniuses.

After Ye Tian came to the Sea of Mixed Ruins, he was very low-key at first, but he quickly found a target.

"Fire Ancient Clan!"

The strength of this Blood Transformation Realm race is not weak, and the strongest one is a boundary-breaking genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, occupying a very precious resource, the Chaos Stone Vein.

This kind of ruin stone vein is very precious, and the existence of the bone transformation realm can extract the ruin liquid from it.

Therefore, the Huogu clan is responsible for mining the ruin stone veins and supplying the ruin cave to obtain a small amount of ruin liquid.

Relying on the chaotic ruin liquid, there were quite a few ordinary eight-stage blood transformation realm creatures of the Fire Ancient Clan.

And Ye Tian killed a seventh-time blood transformation realm creature of the Fire Ancient Clan and obtained a drop of Mixed Ruins Liquid, only to find that the Mixed Ruins Liquid was of great help to cultivators.

"I'm afraid that after I break through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, the Chaos Liquid can quench my heart and quench my heart to the extreme of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Therefore, he was ready to make a move against the Fire Ancient Clan.
